recent_changes.description: Per-entry quality selection for playlist downloads with concrete resolution labels
Default quality changed to 1080p (good) from best
Force MP4 output container for all video downloads
Fixed hydration mismatch on ON/OFF badge (suppressHydrationWarning)
Removed stale firstVideoInfo reference causing ReferenceError crash
URL input + Fetch button visible above download list
Data cleanup - verified download files properly deleted
